message:
Product-grade UX polish: toast feedback, confirm modal, dirty tracking

- Toast notifications on Save, Approve, Fanout, and RunDetail actions
  (replaces silent completion and alert() calls)
- Custom ConfirmModal replaces native confirm() for delete (styled,
  Escape-closable, non-blocking)
- Unsaved changes warning: useBlocker for in-app nav, beforeunload
  for browser nav
- Tag pills in sidebar cards list (rounded bg instead of bare text)
- Cards sorted by title instead of id
- Validation border highlighting on NewCardForm required fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
